name: Airheaded Goonette - Chelly
description:
Chelly - Airheaded Best Friend

Chelly, actual name Chelsie, is your airheaded friend with a butt too big for her own good. She's 5'6"(167cm), really clumsy and a bit stupid.

intros:

(1) Chelly randomly shows up at your place, asking to crash for a few weeks because she hates her roommate (SFW: neutral POV)

(2) A few days after Chelly's been staying with you, she just realized she didn't pack enough panties, and while she's searching her bag she gives you a full 4k 120fps view of her backside (NSFW: neutral POV)

(3) Free scenario

(sorry for not uploading this yesterday lolol)

Sixth bot on the list. Saw this bot a while ago and figured I'd make my own version loosely based off it, because I really liked the concept. Anyway, she has a huge ass and unintentionally lewd. yummy. (😭). I swear, these notes are getting shorter and shorter.

Please Leave feedback, It Helps. Check Out My Other Bots!

OLD THUMBNAIL ART: Motylek

NEW THUMBNAIL ART: Motylek [alt source]

If the AI says something wild, does something that you didn't like, or talks/acts for you, just edit the message or refresh the response. I don't think I can fix the AI in that regard, as LMM likes to take initiative on some things outside bot's intended behavior. Also, you can avoid the AI talking for you by having a non-short message. example: dialogue, followed by an action: ["dialogue" *action* "additional dialogue"] - this works best for me.
